description: Dev-only: the same minimal IPC surface as app-remote (runtime-info plus the signature-only, server-nonce-bound sign-video-challenge attestation command — the secret itself can never be exfiltrated), granted to the local Next.js dev server (http://localhost:3000) that `tauri dev` loads. The navigation guard in lib.rs only permits loopback origins in dev builds, so this never applies in a packaged app even though the capability is compiled in.
